assumptions: the input is a well-formed member of frozen S_core
all theorem-facing material carriers and material facts are explicit and finite
admissible dynamics are finite or finite-support
material references have declared endpoints in the finite material universe
source isomorphisms preserve the declared interpretation, value equivalence, material seed, reference relation, axis tags, and rigid constants

definitions.material_universe: finite typed disjoint union of theorem-facing material elements facts values dependencies histories provenance and interpretation clauses
definitions.reference_relation: direct interpretive or dependency reference between declared material-universe nodes
definitions.materiality_closure: least fixed point of successor addition under the finite reference relation
definitions.axis_reduct: least closed induced typed structure generated by the closed material items tagged for one preservation axis
definitions.normalization: lexicographically least finite code among all sort-preserving transports to canonical initial-segment carriers
definitions.applicability: nonemptiness of the closed material axis seed

results.result: Every S_core source contract has an effective finite canonical normalization isomorphic to its theorem-facing material restriction.
The least finite typed reducts S_1 through S_7 and S_8I are effectively obtained by finite reference closure and induced-structure restriction.
Materiality closure stabilizes on every S_core contract and each axis-applicability judgment is decidable.
Normalization and axis-reduct extraction commute with source isomorphism; isomorphic contracts have identical canonical codes.
A non-finite material closure cannot occur in a well-formed S_core contract; such a source is outside S_core rather than a target countermodel.

nonclaims: any W1 through W5 obligation is proved
a FARA target package or uniform FARA constructor exists
FARA faithfully represents S_core or S_IRD
PB-001 is sufficient necessary independent minimal or complete
universality necessity minimality equivalence uniqueness or impossibility is established
proof-assistant verification or independent proof review is complete
next_required_artifact: W1 base-carrier and direct-axis construction proof package
